utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Now check if each is fully specified as required: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) — OK. 2) travel_dates: provided with specific dates (March 10-14, 2024) — OK. 3) transportation: flight details with costs — Has type, some schedule details, and a total cost (€400). Airline name/flight numbers are not required by the format, so this meets 'flight details with costs' — OK. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs — Name given (Adventure Lodge), nights listed as '5 nights' but dates are March 10-14 which is 4 nights; however, the format only requires a hotel selection with costs, so it's specified (name and cost €275) — OK for inclusion. 5) activities: selected activities with costs — Provided as list with names and costs — OK. 6) additional_services: any extra services with costs — Provided (Virtual Personal Assistant €60) — OK. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown — Only a single total (€1555) is given, not a breakdown by category summing to the total. Since the requirement says 'complete cost breakdown', this item is not fully specified. Therefore, 6 items are fully specified out of 7.
